title: CullingGame
description: An event mod that lets you play CullingGame in Minecraft
body:
## When using this mod on YouTube, please include a link to CurseForge in the description.
## 
## Youtubeでこのmodをご使用頂く場合、概要欄にCurseForgeのリンクを必ず貼ってください
## 
## 
## Use of internal data such as textures and models is PROHIBITED.
## テクスチャやモデルなどの内部データの使用は禁止されています。
## 

### Main Features — English Translation
- `/culling_game`: Using this command lets you configure, start, and finish a CullingGame.
- `/culling_game start <xxxx>`: By replacing \<xxxx\> with a colony name from the original work, you can start the CullingGame for that colony.

If you omit \<xxxx\>, a player-only CullingGame will start. When the CullingGame begins, all players receive a Kogane.

If you hold a Kogane in your main hand, a follower Kogane will move to stand in front of you.
Right-clicking a Kogane allows you to add a new rule.


### [Official discord server](https://discord.com/invite/8U2yPdveXJ)
